title: Stardew Vision VLM Output Schema
description: Schema for validating VLM-generated JSON output describing loot box contents. See ADR-002 and ADR-007 for rationale.

cells.description: Array of cell objects describing each position in the grid

item.description: Item name (e.g., 'Copper Bar') or 'empty' for unoccupied cells

quantity.description: Stack count (0 for empty cells, 1-999 for occupied cells)

quality.description: Item quality level. 'normal' = no star, 'silver'/'gold'/'iridium' = quality star detected, null = empty cell only. See ADR-007.
